Emphasize readable, testable code over premature optimization.
Provide Javadoc comments for public methods and classes.
Use meaningful variable names and avoid abbreviations.
Avoid using magic numbers; use constants instead.
Use try-with-resources for file operations to ensure proper resource management.
Avoid unnecessary imports and keep the code clean.
Always import single classes instead of using wildcard imports.
Always use import statements; do not specify the full path for classes in the code unless absolutely necessary.
